$comment: Brand spec TEMPLATE. Copy to brand.json and pin it. Stage 0 can BOOTSTRAP a candidate from the target repo (Tailwind config / CSS vars / components) — but Agent 3 only treats a brand as authoritative when pinned:true. A pinned brand is an INPUT, never invented per-run, so re-runs are deterministic. See docs/BRAND_SPEC.md.
name: Example SaaS
voice: Clear, confident, plain-spoken. No hype, no jargon. Short sentences.
componentStyle: Flat surfaces, generous padding, one subtle shadow level, light backgrounds. Single accent color used sparingly for primary actions only.
